title: Fix overlapping UI elements in test interface

requirements.summary: Fix scrolling behavior in reading test layout so passage and questions panels scroll independently without UI elements blending together
acceptanceCriteria: The passage section scrolls independently without affecting other UI elements
The question section scrolls independently without affecting other UI elements
No visual overlap occurs between the passage content and navigation buttons
No visual overlap occurs between the question content and navigation buttons

file_operations.description: Fix the two-panel layout to ensure independent scrolling for passage and questions. Add proper container height constraints with overflow-hidden on the parent and overflow-auto on individual scrollable panels. Set explicit max-height based on viewport height minus header/footer space to prevent content from extending beyond visible area. Ensure each panel (left for passage, right for questions) has its own scrollable container with defined boundaries that do not overlap with navigation controls.

Update the TestInterface layout structure to properly contain the ReadingTestLayout within fixed viewport boundaries. Add flex container with proper height constraints to ensure the reading layout, navigation buttons, and footer each occupy their designated space without overlap. Use flex-shrink-0 on fixed elements (navigation, footer) and flex-grow with overflow-hidden on the scrollable reading test area.

requirements.summary: Ensure Next and Previous navigation buttons remain visible and properly positioned without overlapping with passage or question content
acceptanceCriteria: Next and Previous buttons are always visible and clickable
Buttons maintain consistent positioning regardless of content scroll state
Buttons do not overlap with scrollable content areas

file_operations.description: Position the Next and Previous navigation buttons in a fixed container separate from the scrollable content areas. Use a dedicated navigation bar with fixed positioning or place it in a flex container with flex-shrink-0 to prevent it from being pushed by or overlapping with scrollable content. Add appropriate padding/margin to create clear visual separation between the buttons and the content panels above them. Ensure z-index layering keeps buttons above content but below any modals.

requirements.summary: Fix footer displaying 'Powered by Sayem Ahtesham' so it does not blend or overlap with passage, questions, or navigation buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Footer text is clearly visible and readable
Footer does not overlap with any scrollable content
Footer maintains proper spacing from navigation buttons
Footer remains in a fixed position at the bottom of the viewport

file_operations.description: Integrate the Footer component into the TestInterface layout with proper containment. Place the Footer in a fixed position container at the bottom of the viewport with flex-shrink-0 to prevent overlap. Add explicit padding-bottom to the main content container to ensure scrollable content does not extend beneath the footer. Ensure the footer has a solid background color and appropriate z-index to remain visible above any content that might scroll beneath it.

Add styling to ensure the Footer component has a solid background, appropriate padding, and proper visual separation from content above it. Consider adding a subtle top border or shadow to clearly delineate the footer from the main content area. Ensure text remains legible with sufficient contrast against the background.
